title: Laurus Labs Capital India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Laurus Labs Capital India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Laurus Labs Capital India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Laurus Labs Capital India:
Laurus Labs Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Laurus Labs Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
